characters.appearance: Young female, slim build, fair complexion. Dark brown hair styled in a loose updo with face-framing strands. Small gold hoop earrings.
characters.wardrobe: Dark green, high-necked, long-sleeved turtleneck top.

characters.appearance: Young female, average build, fair complexion. Light brown hair pulled back. Large, round, wire-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Dark grey zip-up hoodie over a lighter shirt.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: चलो अपनी English speaking practice करते हैं। [Let's practice your English speaking.]
Character B says: हाँ, बिल्कुल! [Yes, absolutely!]
Character A says: ये phrase बोलो: "Do you want to go?" [Say this phrase: "Do you want to go?"]
Character B says: Do you want to go? [Do you want to go?]
Character A says: इसे थोड़ा naturally बोलो: "Do you wanna go?" [Speak it a bit naturally: "Do you wanna go?"]
Character B says: Do you wanna go? [Do you wanna go?]
Character A says: Very good! अब ये try करो: "Let me think about it." [Very good! Now try this: "Let me think about it."]
Character B says: Let me think about it. [Let me think about it.]
Character A says: Try: "Lemme think about it." [Try: "Lemme think about it."]
Character B says: Lemme think about it. [Lemme think about it.]
Character B says: अरे वाह, ये तो आसान है! One more. [Oh wow, this is easy! One more.]
Character A says: "What did you say?" ["What did you say?"]
Character B says: What did you say? [What did you say?]
Character A says: इसे flow में बोलो: "What'd you say?" [Say it in a flow: "What'd you say?"]
Character B says: What'd you say? [What'd you say?]
Character B says: Amazing, मेरी fluency अभी से better लग रही है! मैं और कैसे सीख सकती हूँ? [Amazing, my fluency is already looking better! How can I learn more?]
Character A says: बस Supernova app download करो। हम रोज़ practice करेंगे, और तुम confidently English बोलने लगोगी। [Just download the Supernova app. We will practice daily, and you will start speaking English confidently.]
Character B says: Awesome! मैं अभी download करती हूँ। [Awesome! I am downloading it right now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core value proposition: practical, conversational English practice.
- Builds confidence through immediate, actionable feedback in a supportive tone.
- Ends with a clear, encouraging call-to-action to download the app.
